title: Running a Mock Recall
alt: Five stages of a pharmaceutical mock recall, from selecting a batch to measuring results

items.label: Select a batch
items.desc: Pick a widely distributed batch to test genuine complexity

items.label: Reconstruct distribution
items.desc: Identify every consignee and quantity from your records

items.label: Test communication
items.desc: Confirm customer and authority contacts and templates are current

items.label: Reconcile the numbers
items.desc: Verify released, distributed and recoverable quantities agree

items.label: Measure and record
items.desc: Capture end-to-end time and % accounted for vs target
